examples: I was most interested in your article on water divining.
Know you not that there is no one like me in the science of divining.
Scrying has been used in many cultures as a means of divining the past, present, or future.
Divining whether Knight, 71, will return to Indiana has become a sport unto itself.
If discerning American plans is tricky in the fog of disinformation, divining Mr Hussein's intentions is impossible.
